title: Reset Idle Timeouts with time.Timer in Go
summary: Reset a time.Timer on activity so Go code can detect idle timeouts without recreating timers.
highlights: Resets one timer after each activity
Returns a clear idle timeout error
verification_notes: Run from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4. The verified test suite covers timer expiry, timer resets, closed activity channels, context cancellation, and invalid timeout handling.
